chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Misc. Application No.S-512 of 2024 (Muhammad Khan and others vs. S.S.P Tharparkar and others) DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Date of hearing and order 03-10-2024. Mr. Sikander Ali Kolachi advocate for the applicants. Mr. Dhani Bakhsh Mari, Assistant P.G. = O R D E R Adnan-ul-Karim Memon, J. Applicants Muhammad Khan, Abdul Aziz and Muhammad Nawaz have filed this Criminal Miscellaneous Application under section 561-A Cr.P.C assailing order dated 30-08-2024 passed by learned Additional Sessions Judge-II/ Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Tharparkar @ Mithi, in Criminal Miscellaneous application No.493/2024, whereby application under section 22-A & B Cr.P.C filed by the respondent No.3 was allowed with direction to the S.H.O concerned to record statement of the respondent/complainant and same be incorporated in 154 Cr.P.C book, if it constitutes a cognizable offence. 2. Learned counsel submits that F.I.R No.28/2024 under sections 393, 506, 504, 114, 34 P.P.C has already been registered at PS Kaloi District Tharparkar on 31-08-2024 against the applicants; therefore, the purpose of filing this Crl. Misc. Application has become infructuous. However, he insists that he will pursue his remedy as per law. 3. In view of above interim order passed by this court vide order dated 04-09-2024 is hereby re-called and this Crl. Miscellaneous Application is disposed of as FIR No. 28/2024 of PS Kaloi District Tharparkar has already been registered. JUDGE *Saleem*
